name: Custom plates (Wunschkennzeichen)
description: Choose your preferred letter & number combination. Reservation is free; the combination fee is ~€10.20.

name: Plate stamping
description: We stamp your new plates in-house while you wait.

name: Express handling
description: Same-day processing when possible. Subject to authority capacity.

name: Courier pickup/delivery
description: We pick up your documents and deliver your plates to your door in Rheine.

name: Foreign vehicle import
description: Imported from the EU or abroad? We help with COC, Vollgutachten, and customs docs.

name: Fleet / business account
description: Invoice-based handling for multiple vehicles with a named account manager.
